name: msdlc
description: Stack-agnostic delivery pipeline for Claude Code: spec → architect → [ADR gate] → dev-leader → dev + qc-leader/qc-designer (parallel map/reduce test design) → reviewer → qc-executor + security-auditor → chronicler. Project specifics (stack, commands, lockstep contracts) come from .claude/profile.md at runtime, never hardcoded.
